info.title: Repository Scanner
info.description: API for scanning a Git repository and listing its files.

post.summary: Scans a public Git repository and returns a list of its files.
post.description: This tool takes a public GitHub repository URL, clones it, and lists all the files inside it. Use this when a user wants you to analyze a GitHub repository.

repo_url.description: The full URL of the public GitHub repository to scan.

200.description: A JSON object containing a list of file paths.
